name: tabnexus
description: Use TabNexus browser workspaces and current Chrome tabs from Claude.
long_description: A local-first bridge between Claude and the TabNexus Chrome extension. Search across workspaces, manage workspace lifecycle, save or restore Chrome tabs, batch-add sources, and edit classification, metadata, mind-map layout, and relationships. The bridge never reads your model API keys.

tools.name: read_workspace
tools.description: Read the active or selected TabNexus workspace and current-window tab context.

tools.name: search_cards
tools.description: Search and filter cards across TabNexus workspaces.

tools.name: add_card
tools.description: Add one source or note to a TabNexus workspace.

tools.name: add_cards
tools.description: Add up to 100 sources, notes, or reports atomically.

tools.name: write_report
tools.description: Write a reviewable Agent report into TabNexus.

tools.name: propose_structure
tools.description: Propose non-destructive relationships for human review.

tools.name: edit_workspace
tools.description: Edit workspace groups, classification, card metadata, mind-map layout, and relationships without deleting data.

tools.name: manage_workspaces
tools.description: Create, select, rename, reorder, or duplicate workspaces.

tools.name: delete_workspace_items
tools.description: Explicitly delete cards, groups, or one workspace after confirmation.

tools.name: read_tab_workbench
tools.description: Read the visible tab workbench, including selection, saved state, and recovery entries.

tools.name: manage_tab_workbench
tools.description: Select tabs, select all by state, collapse the rail, focus tabs, or reopen recovery entries.

tools.name: dismiss_recent_tabs
tools.description: Explicitly remove recently closed recovery entries after confirmation.

tools.name: sync_browser_tabs
tools.description: Save current-window tabs, reopen saved cards, or focus a card without closing anything.

tools.name: close_browser_tabs
tools.description: Save and explicitly close selected non-pinned current-window tabs.

tools.name: export_workspace
tools.description: Export a workspace as Markdown or JSON without settings or secrets.

tools.name: manage_preferences
tools.description: Read or update safe TabNexus display and behavior preferences.

tools.name: manage_agent_activity
tools.description: Read or explicitly clear local Agent activity history.
